name: [24]7.ai, Inc.
lede: 247.ai, 24/7.ai runs three capability centers across three Indian cities. Shillong, Hyderabad and Bengaluru, covering bpo, gbs and ssc, built over 26 years.
insight: Search elsewhere and you will usually find one 247.ai, 24/7.ai office in India. We map three, across three cities, each tagged by center type and function. Knowing the whole footprint is what turns a name on a list into an account you can plan against.
